header_banner_body: Before you pay, choose ID verification (no deposit) or a refundable security deposit.
payment_intro: Choose how you want to secure this rental:
path_kyc_body: Complete Didit identity verification in a secure window. Pay is enabled once approved.
path_deposit_body: Combined deposit for items in your cart (refunded when gear is returned).
path_deposit_phase2: Card authorization hold will be collected here in a future update.
verification_pending: Complete verification in the window, then return here.
blocked_body: This account cannot complete a rental checkout. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
login_required: Sign in to your Campmania account to verify your ID, or choose the deposit option.
choose_path: Select verification or deposit to continue to payment.
